journeys.name: Open Email Dialog from Invoice Detail
journeys.description: Navigate to a posted invoice and open the email composition dialog via the action bar overflow menu

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads with invoices visible
steps.visual_check: AR Invoices list page with data table showing invoices, sidebar with AR section active

steps.target: First invoice row with POSTED status
steps.expected_result: Invoice detail page loads showing invoice header, line items, and action bar

steps.target: Action bar with overflow menu (More Actions ⋯ button)
steps.expected_result: Action bar is visible at the top of the detail page with overflow menu button
steps.visual_check: Invoice detail page with action bar visible, POSTED status badge, More Actions button present

steps.expected_result: Dropdown menu opens showing Document Actions section with Email option

steps.target: Email to Customer menu item with Mail icon
steps.expected_result: Email to Customer action is visible in the Document Actions section of the overflow menu
steps.visual_check: Overflow dropdown showing Document Actions section with 'Email to Customer' item and Mail icon, not greyed out

steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens with pre-filled fields from template
Dialog is visible with title 'Send Invoice INV-XXXXX via Email', purple accent top border, From/To/Subject/Body fields pre-filled, PDF attachment card visible
steps.visual_check: 600px centered modal with purple accent top border, dialog title includes invoice number, From dropdown populated, To field has customer email chip, Subject contains 'Invoice' text from template, Body area has rendered template HTML, PDF attachment card at bottom with filename and auto-generated badge, Cancel and Send Email buttons in footer

journeys.name: Verify Pre-filled Email Fields from Template
journeys.description: Confirm the email composition dialog correctly pre-fills From, To, Subject, and Body from the document-type-specific email template with Handlebars variables populated

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First invoice row with POSTED status
steps.expected_result: Invoice detail page loads
Overflow menu opens
Email composition dialog opens with pre-filled fields

steps.target: From field — dropdown showing company email alias
steps.expected_result: From field is a dropdown (not free-text input) pre-filled with the company's configured SMTP fromEmail address

steps.target: To field — email chip with customer email
steps.expected_result: To field contains an email chip with the customer's email address auto-resolved from the invoice's customer record
Subject line matches the INVOICE_SEND template pattern: 'Invoice {invoiceNumber} from {companyName}' with actual values substituted

steps.target: Body textarea with rendered template HTML
steps.expected_result: Body contains rendered HTML from the invoice email template with customer name greeting, invoice details, amount, due date, and company contact footer
Attachment card shows PDF icon, filename like 'Invoice-INV-XXXXX.pdf', file size, and 'Auto-generated' badge
steps.visual_check: PDF attachment card with purple-tinted styling (12px radius, custom shadow), showing PDF file icon, filename matching 'Invoice-{number}.pdf' pattern, file size text, and auto-generated badge

journeys.name: Add CC and BCC Recipients
journeys.description: Expand CC/BCC fields and add multiple email recipients using the chip input

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads
Invoice detail page loads
Email composition dialog opens
CC toggle link is visible below the To field, BCC field is hidden
CC field expands with an empty multi-email chip input
steps.visual_check: CC field now visible below To field with placeholder text, [+ Bcc] toggle link also visible

steps.expected_result: Email text entered in CC input

steps.target: Press Enter key in CC input
steps.expected_result: Email chip 'finance@partner.com' is created in the CC field
Second email text entered

steps.target: Press comma key in CC input
steps.expected_result: Second email chip 'manager@partner.com' is created in the CC field
BCC field expands below CC field
BCC email text entered

steps.target: Press Enter key in BCC input
steps.expected_result: Email chip 'audit@company.co.uk' created in BCC field
steps.visual_check: Dialog showing To field with original customer email chip, CC field with two chips (finance@partner.com, manager@partner.com), BCC field with one chip (audit@company.co.uk)

journeys.name: Email Recipient Validation — Invalid Format
journeys.description: Verify that invalid email addresses are rejected with visual feedback in the recipient chip input

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens
Text entered in the To input

steps.target: Press Enter key in To input
steps.expected_result: Invalid email chip is created but highlighted in red with error styling
steps.visual_check: To field shows the original valid customer email chip (normal styling) and the invalid 'not-an-email' chip highlighted in red with error tooltip indicating RFC 5322 validation failure

steps.expected_result: Another invalid email text entered

steps.target: Press Enter key in To input
steps.expected_result: Another red-highlighted invalid chip created
Invalid chip is removed from the To field
steps.visual_check: To field now shows only the valid customer email chip and the remaining invalid chip 'missing@domain'

journeys.name: Duplicate Recipient Detection Across Fields
journeys.description: Verify that duplicate email addresses across TO/CC/BCC fields trigger a warning per BR-COM-002

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens with customer email in To field
CC field expands

steps.target: CC email input — enter the same email that's already in the To field
steps.expected_result: Duplicate email text entered in CC

steps.target: Press Enter key in CC input
steps.expected_result: Duplicate email chip is created but with a warning indicator (duplicate detected across TO/CC)
steps.visual_check: CC field shows the duplicate email chip with a warning style (amber/orange highlight or warning tooltip) indicating the address already exists in the To field

journeys.name: Switch Email Template via Template Selector
journeys.description: Use the template selector dropdown to switch between available templates and verify fields are repopulated

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens with default INVOICE_SEND template applied
Template selector dropdown is visible showing the current template name
Subject field now shows the manually typed text instead of template-rendered subject
Dropdown opens listing available templates for CustomerInvoice document type
steps.visual_check: Dropdown open showing list of available templates for CustomerInvoice type, including the default INVOICE_SEND template

steps.target: A different template from the dropdown (if available), or re-select the same template
steps.expected_result: Template selection changes
Subject and Body fields are repopulated with the selected template's rendered output, overwriting manual changes
steps.visual_check: Subject field restored to template-rendered value (no longer shows 'Custom subject override'), Body field shows freshly rendered template HTML

journeys.name: Send Document Email Successfully
journeys.description: Complete the full email send flow: open dialog, verify pre-filled data, click Send, confirm success toast and dialog closure

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads
Invoice detail page loads
Email composition dialog opens with pre-filled fields

steps.target: Send Email button in dialog footer
steps.expected_result: Send Email button is visible and enabled (primary purple button)
Send button shows loading spinner, becomes disabled to prevent double-click
Success toast appears with message 'Email queued for delivery'
steps.visual_check: Success toast (green) visible at top/bottom of screen with 'Email queued for delivery' message, email composition dialog has closed, invoice detail page is visible underneath

steps.expected_result: Dialog is no longer visible, invoice detail page is fully accessible

journeys.name: Send Email Blocked Without TO Recipient
journeys.description: Attempt to send an email with no TO recipient and verify client-side validation prevents submission

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens

steps.target: × button on the pre-filled TO email chip to remove it
steps.expected_result: TO email chip is removed, To field is now empty
Send is blocked — validation error shown indicating at least one TO recipient is required
steps.visual_check: To field highlighted with error styling (red border or error message below), Send button may be disabled or error toast shown, dialog remains open

journeys.name: Email Action Hidden for Non-Sendable Status
journeys.description: Verify the Email action is disabled or hidden when the document is in DRAFT status (not in SENDABLE_STATUS_MAP)

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: An invoice row with DRAFT status
steps.expected_result: Invoice detail page loads showing DRAFT status badge
Overflow menu opens

steps.target: Email to Customer menu item — should be disabled or absent
steps.expected_result: Email action is either not shown in the menu or is greyed out/disabled for DRAFT invoices
steps.visual_check: Overflow menu open showing Document Actions section, Email to Customer item is either missing from the list or visually greyed out with disabled styling, indicating the document is not in a sendable state

journeys.name: Attachment Preview Card Display and Interaction
journeys.description: Verify the auto-generated PDF attachment card shows correct information and can be removed

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens
Attachment card visible showing PDF file icon, filename matching 'Invoice-{number}.pdf', file size, and 'Auto-generated' badge
steps.visual_check: Purple-tinted attachment card (12px radius, custom shadow) with PDF icon, filename like 'Invoice-INV-00XXX.pdf', file size text, auto-generated badge, and × remove button

steps.target: × remove button on the attachment preview card
steps.expected_result: Attachment card is removed from the dialog

steps.target: Attachment area — card should be gone
steps.expected_result: Attachment preview card is no longer visible, possibly showing '[+ Attach File]' button instead
steps.visual_check: Attachment area now empty or showing an [+ Attach File] button, no PDF card visible

journeys.name: Cancel and Close Email Dialog
journeys.description: Verify the email composition dialog can be cancelled and closed without sending

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens

steps.target: Subject field — modify to test unsaved changes
steps.expected_result: Subject field updated
Dialog closes without sending email, no toast notification appears

steps.target: Invoice detail page is fully visible, no dialog overlay
steps.expected_result: Dialog is closed, invoice detail page is accessible, no success/error toast visible
steps.visual_check: Invoice detail page fully visible without any dialog overlay, no toast notifications

steps.target: More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer (reopen dialog)
steps.expected_result: Dialog reopens with original template-rendered fields (not the modified subject)
Dialog closes via the header close button
steps.visual_check: Invoice detail page visible again, dialog fully closed

journeys.name: Responsive Email Dialog Layout
journeys.description: Verify the email composition dialog adapts to different viewport sizes per Concept D responsive rules

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First POSTED invoice → More Actions ⋯ → Email to Customer
steps.expected_result: Email composition dialog opens at desktop width
Dialog is a 600px centered modal with all fields visible
steps.visual_check: 600px wide centered modal dialog on desktop viewport, all form fields visible without scrolling, purple accent top border, Concept D styling

steps.expected_result: Dialog adapts to 90% viewport width
steps.visual_check: Dialog fills approximately 90% of the 800px viewport width (~720px), all fields still usable

steps.expected_result: Dialog becomes full-screen bottom sheet layout with Send button fixed at bottom
steps.visual_check: Full-screen bottom sheet layout covering the viewport, form fields stacked vertically, Send Email button fixed at the bottom of the screen, scrollable content area above
